stories.title: Copy of Worst-to-first rankings: Which NFL teams are most ...
stories.summary: We stacked last season's last-place finishers in each division by their chances to jump all the way to first. Will the Lions get back on top in the NFC North?

stories.title: 10 players who could get traded before the season'...
stories.summary: The NFL trade deadline isn't until November, but we're making early predictions on 10 players.

stories.title: FIFA cancels WC tickets mistakenly given for free
stories.summary: FIFA has canceled World Cup tickets issued to about 60 fans who mistakenly got them for free because of a website error.

stories.title: Vegas' McNabb to hospital after puck to face
stories.summary: Golden Knights defenseman Brayden McNabb left Thursday's Stanley Cup Final game against the Hurricanes after a puck traveling 87 mph hit him around the visor.

stories.title: Zverev uses clear path to reach French Open final
stories.summary: The pressure has been on Alexander Zverev to finally win an elusive Grand Slam title, and now the second-seeded German is only one victory away from raising the French Open trophy.
